creator: grabbend@hotmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE is available in the AWS Marketplace for the old Graviton2 (ARM64) EC2 instances (e.g: t4g.small).

However, if you try to use a Graviton3 (ARM64) instance like the c7g.medium you get the following error:

> Instance launch failed
> The instance configuration for this AWS Marketplace product is not supported. Please see the AWS Marketplace site for more information about supported instance types, regions, and operating systems.

Currently available Graviton3 instance families are: c7g, m7g & r7g.

Relevant information for c7g from 2022:
- https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/instance-types/c7g/
- https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/new-amazon-ec2-c7g-instances-powered-by-aws-graviton3-processors/

m7g and r7g (Graviton3) which launched this year:
- https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/instance-types/m7g/
- https://aws.amazon.com/ec2/instance-types/r7g/
- https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/aws/new-graviton3-based-general-purpose-m7g-and-memory-optimized-r7g-amazon-ec2-instances/

Support for Graviton3 instances would be highly appreciated!
